content.text:
npm install reported 2 moderate audit findings; I did not run forced audit fixes because that can introduce breaking dependency upgrades.
tests/web/test_backtest_routes.py hung under a 20s timeout in this environment, so I did not count it as part of the final pass.
The validation Uvicorn server is still running on 127.0.0.1:18080 as PID 187211; the environment rejected my approval request to stop it.
